name: axios-wrapper
description: Base Axios HTTP client class with auto-cancellation of concurrent requests, CSRF token management, and optional request/error collection for debugging.
when_to_use: Base Axios HTTP client class with auto-cancellation of concurrent requests, CSRF token management, and optional request/error collection for debugging
avoid: Not for direct use — subclass it to define domain-specific API methods. Not for browser-unaware server environments.

name: AxiosWrapper
description: Base class wrapping Axios that adds automatic cancellation of concurrent requests, CSRF token management, default headers, and optional request/error collection to localStorage. Intended to be subclassed to define application-specific API methods.
when_to_use: Building a typed API client class for a Gravity UI application
Automatically cancelling in-flight requests when the same endpoint is called again
Adding CSRF protection to POST/PUT/DELETE requests
Collecting recent requests and errors for debugging
avoid: Direct usage without subclassing — subclass to define domain-specific methods
Browser-unaware environments without polyfilling cancel tokens

parameters.name: options.collector
parameters.description: How many recent requests/errors to keep in the collector.

parameters.name: options.apiEndpoint
parameters.description: Base API path prefix, defaults to '/api'.

parameters.name: options.csrfHeaderName
parameters.description: CSRF token header name, defaults to 'X-CSRF-Token'.

examples:
// Auto-cancel concurrent requests
api.get('/search', { q: term }, { concurrentId: 'search' });
